name: CAPITAL PROPERTIES INC /RI/
summary: Capital Properties Inc. is a Rhode Island-based company that leases company-owned land in Capital Center and adjacent Parcel 20 in downtown Providence, Rhode Island under long-term ground leases of 99 years or more. The company owns approximately 18 acres in Capital Center across 13 individual parcels. Through subsidiary Tri-State Displays, Inc., it also leases 23 outdoor advertising locations with 44 billboard faces along interstate and primary highways in Rhode Island and Massachusetts to Lamar Outdoor Advertising, LLC under a lease expiring in 2057.

products.name: Long-Term Ground Leases
products.description: Leasing of company-owned land in Capital Center and Parcel 20 in downtown Providence, RI under long-term ground leases of 99 years or more.

products.name: Billboard Lease
products.description: Leasing of 23 outdoor advertising locations with 44 billboard faces along interstate and primary highways in Rhode Island and Massachusetts via subsidiary Tri-State Displays, Inc.

products.name: Public Parking Leases
products.description: Short-term leasing of Parcels 3E, 3W, 4E, 4W and a portion of Parcel 20 for public parking purposes to Metropark, Ltd.

partnerships.description: Lease of 23 outdoor advertising locations with 44 billboard faces in Rhode Island and Massachusetts expiring in 2057, with annual base rent increases of 2.75% and revenue participation.
Lease of Parcels 3E, 3W, 4E, 4W and a portion of Parcel 20 for public parking purposes.
Permanent easements granted to the Company for all but one of the 23 outdoor advertising billboard locations.
